Have you not seenFootnote-1 how your Lord dealt with the people of the elephants?Footnote-2
Did He not bring their planFootnote-3 to naught?Footnote-4
And He sent against them swarms of birdsFootnote-5
which smote them with stones of baked clay,Footnote-6
and made them like straw eaten up (by cattle).Footnote-7
